description: The name of the searched domain.
examples:
Command Example
!irisk-add-domain newscan=false domain=demisto.com
Human Readable Output
2. Get the status of a scan
Queries the status of a scan.
Base Command
irisk-get-scan-status
Input

!irisk-add-domain newscan=false domain=demisto.com
Human Readable Output
2. Get the status of a scan
Queries the status of a scan.
Base Command
irisk-get-scan-status
Input
Argument Name
name: irisk-get-scan-status

outputs.description: The name of the scanned domain. C2sec.Domain.Scan.workitemid The ID of the current scan.
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Scan.domain

outputs.description: date The time that the scan was completed. C2sec.Domain.Scan.creationTime
outputs.name: C2sec.Domain.Scan.completeTime

outputs.description: The time that the scan was initiated. C2sec.Domain.Scan.status
outputs.name: date
